Colormap for Pebble Time watches in a format compatible with gifsicle's --user-colormap flag.

# Purpose
This file defines a colormap for Pebble Time family watches in a format compatible with the `gifsicle` tool. Each line specifies a color using RGB values, where each value ranges from 0 to 255. The colormap is used to map colors in images or animations to the limited color palette supported by the Pebble Time watches. The file is intended for use with the `--user-colormap` flag in `gifsicle`, which allows users to apply a custom colormap when processing GIF images. This ensures that the images are displayed correctly on the Pebble Time devices by adhering to their specific color capabilities.
